Maricopa County Emergency Medicine

Residency apparel order

I'm putting together another group order for sweaters. Pricing comes out to approximately $25 for the Frayed Edge T-Shirt and $28 for the Oversized Sweatshirt (including shipping and taxes). The more people who order, the lower the final cost per item, so share this with anyone who might be interested.

Orders close Tuesday, May 6 at noon. This should give us enough time to get the order in before the new interns arrive in June. Late submissions cannot be guaranteed.
